title: glandularia rinconensis
intro: Glandularia rinconensis, also known as the Rincon button mint or Puerto Rico buttonmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Puerto Rico and is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Glandularia rinconensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
